'''vawowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khalam|khalam]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-w-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khalam|khalam]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vawowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væweweth|væweweth]] || [[word:væwewej|væwewej]] || [[word:væwewesh|væwewesh]] || [[word:væwewe|væwewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vawowowoth|vawowowoth]] || [[word:vawowowoj|vawowowoj]] || [[word:vawowowosh|vawowowosh]] || [[word:vawowowo|vawowowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vawowoth|vawowoth]] || [[word:vawowoj|vawowoj]] || [[word:vawowosh|vawowosh]] || [[word:vawowo|vawowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vawofwoth|vawofwoth]] || [[word:vawofwoj|vawofwoj]] || [[word:vawofwosh|vawofwosh]] || [[word:vawofwof|vawofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vawowotho|vawowotho]] || [[word:vawowojo|vawowojo]] || [[word:vawowosho|vawowosho]] || [[word:vawowoko|vawowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vawowoth|vawowoth]] || [[word:vawowoj|vawowoj]] || [[word:vawowosh|vawowosh]] || [[word:vawowo|vawowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vawowothol|vawowothol]] || [[word:vawowojol|vawowojol]] || [[word:vawowoshol|vawowoshol]] || [[word:vawowokol|vawowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vawowothotho|vawowothotho]] || [[word:vawowojojo|vawowojojo]] || [[word:vawowoshosho|vawowoshosho]] || [[word:vawowoko|vawowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vawowothon|vawowothon]] || [[word:vawowojon|vawowojon]] || [[word:vawowoshon|vawowoshon]] || [[word:vawowokon|vawowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vawowothoro|vawowothoro]] || [[word:vawowojoro|vawowojoro]] || [[word:vawowoshoro|vawowoshoro]] || [[word:vawowokoro|vawowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
